harness.evidence_capture: response_extra per row (reasoning text where provider exposes it, finish/stop reason, reasoning/thinking token counts)

moonshot:kimi-k2.5#thinking=off.notes: instant mode; temperature omitted (provider forces 1); hidden thinking disabled, visible CoT permitted

anthropic:claude-sonnet-5.notes: provider defaults; model thinks by default (thinking tokens billed, text redacted by provider, count captured)

openai:gpt-5.4#effort=medium.notes: reasoning enabled explicitly (provider default is effort off); reasoning text not returned by provider, count captured

conditions.roster_rationale: Shortlist run: three configurations that answered the validation task correctly in per-provider pre-flight curls (see VALIDATION.md). Excluded after validation: openai:gpt-5.4 default (answered instantly and wrong), moonshot:kimi-k2.5 default thinking (exhausted 4096-token budget without emitting an answer; correct answer present in its reasoning trace). This is a cost-comparison shortlist, not a full-roster leaderboard; excluded configs are documented, not hidden.

batch_2.note: Nine additional configs run 2026-07-03 after the batch-1 comparison, same harness settings (workers 1, timeout 300s, max_output_tokens 16384, evidence capture). No per-config pre-flight probes; post-hoc audit in ANALYSIS.md.

openai:gpt-5.5.note: provider defaults; reasoning tokens observed in usage

moonshot:kimi-k2.6.note: default thinking; 1/20 rows died at the output cap

roster_rationale: Batch 1 (first three models) was a shortlist of probe-validated configs; see VALIDATION.md. Batch 2 extends the run to the full priced roster without shortlisting, making the combined board a near-census of the price sheet (only gpt-5.4#effort=high remains unrun). Excluded batch-1 probe failures (kimi-k2.5 default, gpt-5.4 default) remain replayable from tasks.jsonl.
